summary: Stay Pillar Feature Testing - All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly. 25/25 backend tests passed. Public Stay page shows 32 pet-friendly properties with Paw Ratings, badges, and pet fees. Admin Stay Manager has 5 tabs (Properties, Bookings, Issues, Reports) with full CRUD functionality.
seed_data_creation: 32 pet-friendly hotels seeded across India (Goa, Rajasthan, Kerala, Himachal Pradesh, Uttarakhand, Maharashtra, Karnataka, Tamil Nadu, Haryana, Andaman, Puducherry)

details: Page loads with hero section and tagline
Paw Ratings (5 categories: Comfort, Safety, Freedom, Care, Joy) visible
Badges displayed (Pet Menu, Off-leash area, Pet sitter, Grooming, Vet on call, Trails, Beach access)
Vibe filter buttons (Beach, Luxury, Quiet, etc.) present
Property details modal opens on card click
Modal has tabs: Overview, Pet Policy, Paw Rating, Amenities
Request Booking button visible in modal
Dashboard stats: 32 Live Properties, 32 Total Properties, 1 Pending Booking
Property list shows all 32 seeded properties
Each property shows: name, location, type, rating, badges, status, verified badge
Actions: Edit, Status dropdown (Live/Paused/Draft), Website link, Delete
Buttons: Refresh, Seed Data, Add Property
GET /api/stay/properties - Returns 32 properties with cities list
5 categories: Comfort, Safety, Freedom, Care, Joy
3-step wizard: Guest Details, Pet Profile, Stay Details
Booking request API creates booking successfully

context_for_next_testing_agent: Stay pillar is fully functional. 32 pet-friendly hotels seeded from across India. Public page at /stay shows properties with Paw Ratings and booking requests. Admin Stay Manager at /admin (Stay tab) has full CRUD for properties, bookings, issues, and reports. All APIs tested and working. Test file at /app/tests/test_stay_feature.py can be reused for regression testing.
